name: ᴢᴏᴍʙɪᴇ — Todd Sten
description:
A failed experiment, a society crumbled.. And a strangely loyal zombie who'd tear a mans jugular out with his teeth for you. Well, no one said the apocolypse would be predictable.

If he doesn't wear a collar and act as a guard dog for you, is he really your man?

Today i give you a petplay zombie boyfriend. Tomorrow? Who knows.
creator: Ohyknow
